message:
chore(tests): fix unused imports, formatting, missing_docs attributes

- Add #![allow(missing_docs)] to all integration test files — test crates are
  not public API and requiring doc comments on every test function adds noise
  without value

- circuit_breaker_repro: remove unused imports (Time, Duration) and add
  allow(unused_imports) for the remaining import used only in the test body

- det_hash_portability: normalize hex literals to use underscored form
  (0x1234_5678) per Rust style conventions, fix trailing whitespace, wrap long
  assert_eq message

- pool_warmup_wakeup: reorder imports alphabetically, fix closure formatting
  (WaitOnce::new, factory spawn, acquire closure), add drop(lock) before break
  to avoid holding MutexGuard across the break, remove unused pool_clone2 binding

- recovery_security: remove unnecessary .clone() on symbol (moved into struct
  immediately after), normalize formatting of orchestrator construction and
  result assertion

- repro_local_task_leak: add missing_docs allow

- repro_storm_dead_zone: wrap long assert message, add blank line after allow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
